Goldstrom	Connor	132490749	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	02/08/21	04/11/21	02/08/21	02/08/21	02/08/21	02/08/21	02/08/21	04/11/21	02/08/21	02/08/21	02/08/21	02/08/21	05/03/22	05/03/22	05/03/22	11/14/21	11/14/21	11/14/21	04/23/22	04/23/22	04/23/22	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	11/14/21	11/14/21	11/14/21		10/03/22	10/03/22	10/19/22	04/11/21	05/03/22	11/16/21	10/19/22	10/19/22	10/19/22	10/19/22	10/11/22	03/25/22	04/23/22	04/23/22	04/11/21	06/10/22	04/23/22	04/11/21	04/11/21	11/14/21	11/15/21	04/11/21	11/14/21	04/11/21	11/01/22	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	04/11/21	01/03/23	01/10/23	01/10/23	04/11/21	04/11/21	01/03/23	01/03/23	04/11/21	11/11/22	11/10/22	01/10/23	01/10/23	01/10/23	02/05/23	02/05/23	09/26/22	09/26/22	09/26/22	09/26/22	09/26/22	06/10/22	06/10/22	06/10/22	06/10/22	02/08/21	06/07/22	06/10/22	06/10/22	06/10/22	06/10/22	06/05/22	01/30/23	06/10/22	06/10/22	01/18/23	06/10/22	06/10/22	06/10/22	01/22/23	02/21/23	06/10/22	03/20/23	03/20/23	01/29/23	02/05/23	09/26/22	01/22/23	01/22/23	03/28/23	03/28/23	03/28/23	12/05/23	12/05/23	12/05/23	12/05/23	09/19/23	10/03/23	12/05/23	01/21/25	01/21/25	12/02/24	01/21/25	01/21/25	12/03/24	01/21/25

McDaid	Will	132490934	11/14/20	11/14/20	11/14/20	11/14/20	11/14/20	11/14/20	11/14/20	11/14/20	11/14/20	11/14/20	01/20/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	01/26/21	04/20/21	04/20/21	05/23/21	11/14/20	11/14/21	06/30/20	06/30/20	01/24/21	11/14/20	11/14/20	11/14/20	05/23/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	05/16/21	05/16/21	05/16/21		03/08/21	04/19/21	04/19/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	11/14/21	05/23/21	01/04/22	01/04/22	11/14/21	11/14/21	11/14/21	01/20/21	11/14/21	11/14/21	11/14/21	11/14/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	11/14/21	11/14/21	01/20/21	05/03/22	01/20/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	11/14/21	11/14/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	01/20/21	11/16/21	11/16/21	05/03/22	01/20/21	01/20/21	08/17/22	08/17/22	02/01/22	04/05/22	04/05/22	08/21/22	08/21/22	08/21/22	09/26/22	11/08/22	09/19/22	09/19/22	09/13/22	09/13/22	04/23/22	10/06/22	08/17/22	10/06/22	10/04/22	02/08/21	12/21/22	11/20/22	11/01/22	11/01/22	11/08/22	08/17/22	08/17/22	08/12/22	08/17/22	08/17/22	08/17/22	08/17/22	08/17/22	12/22/22	12/15/22	11/01/22	10/26/22	10/26/22	09/26/22	12/22/22	09/26/22	04/03/22	11/01/22	12/23/22	12/23/22	12/23/22	06/09/23	06/09/23	05/02/23	06/09/23	06/09/23	06/09/23	06/09/23	04/22/24	04/22/24	04/22/24	04/22/24	04/21/24	04/22/24	04/22/24
